noticias.titulo: Sell in May? You Would’ve Missed One of the S&P 500’s Best Mays Since the ‘50s.
noticias.resumen: The S&P 500, driven by tech stocks, is on pace to power more than 5% higher this month, marking one of the best performances in May since the 1950s.
